Package com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec

Interface GenerationResource

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    GenerationResourceImpl
    public interface GenerationResource
    Interface defining the contract for interacting with the Generation resource of the Gemini API.
    Since:
    0.0.1
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GeminiResult generateContent​(GenerateContentRequest request)
      Generates content using the provided request.
      GenerateContentRequestBuilder generateContentBuilder​(String userInput)
      Creates a new GenerateContentRequestBuilder instance to build a GenerateContentRequest for generating content.
      GenerateTextRequestBuilder generateTextBuilder​(String userInput)
      Creates a new GenerateTextRequestBuilder instance to build a GenerateContentRequest for generating text.
      GeminiClient getGeminiClient()
      Returns the associated GeminiClient.

    • Method Detail

      • getGeminiClient

        GeminiClient getGeminiClient()
        Returns the associated GeminiClient.
        Returns:
        The GeminiClient instance.
        Since:
        0.0.2

      • generateContent

        GeminiResult generateContent​(GenerateContentRequest request)
                      throws GeminiApiException,
                             JsonException,
                             HttpException
        Generates content using the provided request.
        Parameters:
        request - The GenerateContentRequest containing the generation parameters.
        Returns:
        A GeminiResult containing the generated content and shortcuts.
        Throws:
        GeminiApiException - If an error occurs during content generation.
        JsonException
        HttpException
        Since:
        0.0.2

      • generateTextBuilder

        GenerateTextRequestBuilder generateTextBuilder​(String userInput)
        Creates a new GenerateTextRequestBuilder instance to build a GenerateContentRequest for generating text.
        Returns:
        A new GenerateTextRequestBuilder instance.
        Since:
        0.0.2

      • generateContentBuilder

        GenerateContentRequestBuilder generateContentBuilder​(String userInput)
        Creates a new GenerateContentRequestBuilder instance to build a GenerateContentRequest for generating content.
        Parameters:
        userInput - The required user input for the generation request.
        Returns:
        A new GenerateContentRequestBuilder instance.
        Since:
        0.0.2
